articles.title: Meta axes controversial Muse generative AI feature amid privacy concerns
articles.description: Meta is discontinuing its Muse generative AI feature that it launched last week. Muse quickly garnered criticism for allowing people to generate images based on photos and videos from public Meta accounts on the likes of Instagram, even if they didn’t consent to this use. In a statement to outlets like Reuters, the company said […]
articles.content:

articles.title: challans in 3 months; riders without helmet lead charts
articles.description: Senior traffic cop says more AI-powered cameras to be installed in Ludhiana.
articles.content: The e-challaning system of the Police Commissionerate, Ludhiana, has been fully operational now. The high definition cameras installed at various intersections in the industrial hub have caught as many as 66,079 offenders from April to June for commi... [2755 chars]

articles.title: iOS 27 public beta is here: how to download it now
articles.description: The iOS 27 public beta is officially live, delivering a massive wave of features that range from a highly contextual Siri AI to more Apple Intelligence features.
articles.content: You don’t have to wait any longer to experience the latest iPhone software because the iOS 27 public beta is finally available. Arriving a little over a month after its reveal at WWDC 2026, this release brings the new Siri and a host of fresh Apple I... [2306 chars]

articles.title: Siri AI Is Becoming Apple’s Everything Tool
articles.description: Apple’s revamped Siri is more than a voice assistant; it’s now the backbone of the iPhone user experience. You can try it now through the iOS 27 public beta.
articles.content:
The latest version of Apple’s smartphone software, iOS 27, is available for iPhone owners as a public beta. It’s the first time Apple’s long-promised revamped version of Siri is available to the general public.
Showcased at the company’s WWDC event i... [8277 chars]

articles.title: 'Not sexy' or 'Tech Moment'? Lorde hates on AI glasses as Kylie Jenner faces backlash over Meta campaign
articles.description: During her set at Madrid's Mad Cool Festival, Lorde took aim at wearable AI, calling smart glasses "not sexy." Meanwhile, Kylie Jenner is facing backlash over her collaboration with Meta on a line of AI-powered smart glasses featuring a built-in camera, and hands-free recording capabilities.
articles.content:
Lorde has made her stance on AI smart glasses crystal clear.
During her set at Madrid's Mad Cool Festival over the weekend, the singer paused to take aim at the wearable AI technology, urging fans to think twice before embracing it.
"Increasingly, in... [4300 chars]

articles.title: Govt Working with AI Cos for Models on Par with Mythos
articles.description: The Indian government has asked homegrown AI firms Sarvam and BharatGen to tweak their existing foundation models and develop Mythos-like capabilities that can be deployed to protect the country's critical infrastructure against cyberattacks, top officials in the know told ET.

articles.title: Jet.AI Closes Transaction with flyExclusive, Advancing Transition to a Pure-Play AI Infrastructure
articles.description: LAS VEGAS, July 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Jet.AI Inc. (NASDAQ: JTAI) ('Jet.AI” or the 'Company”), an emerging provider of high-performance GPU infrastructure and AI cloud services, announced the successful closing of its merger transaction with flyExclusive, Inc. ('flyExclusive”), following stockholder approval at the Company’s reconvened Special Meeting of Stockholders and satisfaction of all remaining customary closing conditions.
